tokens: (When) we get back in there, I don't think we have to apologize to anybody.

tokens: (Kicking his boots and shaking the spacecraft) Whoops.
Well, I guess I got about (counting the marks on the gauge) 25, 20, 15, I guess thirteen percent oxygen (and) 3.8 (psi).
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: (Answering Bob) No; thirteen percent, I think.
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: What am I caught on back there?
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: You're just scraping against your PLSS.
transcript.speaker: Schmitt

tokens: Your leg pockets might be part of the problem.
transcript.speaker: Schmitt

tokens: Just hug as close as you can.
transcript.speaker: Schmitt

tokens: Yup, let me just get on my feet here.
Got to turn one way or the other.
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: Get your PLSS back in there towards the circuit breakers.
transcript.speaker: Schmitt

tokens: Move your right...(correcting himself) your left arm.
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: Let me make sure there's nothing in that hatch.
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: That's one thing that's in there.
transcript.speaker: Schmitt

tokens: From where I stand, all I can see is dust.
transcript.speaker: Schmitt

tokens: Is that what do we do next?
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: Pockets...Your pockets (are catching on the hatch door).
transcript.speaker: Schmitt

tokens: (Reading from the post-EVA cue card, which has the same information as checklist page
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: (Gene is breathing very heavily) That's why you don't turn your Primary Water off when you go to Aux.
transcript.speaker: Parker

tokens: No, I can't quite reach it.
transcript.speaker: Schmitt

tokens: Well, if you can roll to the left, I'll get it for you.
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: I've gotten bigger since I've been out there.
(Pause) You got to go (that is, turn) more.
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: There's something keeping me from going more.
transcript.speaker: Schmitt

tokens: Okay, let me see if I can't...(Pause)
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: (Garbled) awfully far inboard for what I (garbled).
transcript.speaker: Schmitt

tokens: Now you're going to have to move way over there, so I can get the hatch.
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: Yeah, I have to go back the way I was.
transcript.speaker: Schmitt

tokens: Back up against the circuit breakers.
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: Can you see what I'm catching on, upward?
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: You're just hitting the rail over there.
transcript.speaker: Schmitt

tokens: (Pause) See, I can't..."Close and lock forward hatch", huh?
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: Okay, I got a tone and I got an H2O flag.
transcript.speaker: Schmitt

tokens: Okay, PLSS O2 is not less than 10 percent.
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: "If not less (than 10 percent)...manual control repress." Okay.
I've got to turn (so that he can get at the valves and circuit breakers and controlling the Environmental Control System).
transcript.speaker: Schmitt

tokens: Let me get out of your way.
About as far as I can go.
I'll read it to you, when you get there.
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: I think part of our problem is this slope.
There's no "purchase"- as my Father used to say - no "purchase".
transcript.speaker: Schmitt

tokens: I'll try and get cabin...that master.
(Audible sound of repressurization) Well, I can't (garbled).
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: Okay, and I want your PLSS O2 Off, when I give you a call.
That's when we get greater than 2.5 (psi cabin pressure).
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: If you can't, I'll reach it for you.
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: And you use the Purge valve to depress.
transcript.speaker: Cernan

tokens: Let me just take a look here at 4.6.
Cabin's up to...Cabin's up to 5, Jack.
transcript.speaker: Cernan
